name: Friends page shows party discovery or the current party
description: The Friends/Party page shows either a discovery view with create-party and join-by-code options, or the user's existing party with its name, members, and quests.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Friends link in the sidebar

Verify the page shows EITHER a discovery view containing a Create Party action and a join-with-code input field, OR an existing-party view displaying the party name with a members section and a quests section — confirming the social view rendered one of its real states rather than an empty container
